recommendations.title: Soulcatcher
recommendations.overview: A military contractor hired to seize a weapon that turns people into savage killers seeks revenge when his brother falls victim to the device.

recommendations.title: Demon City
recommendations.overview: Framed for his family's murder and left for dead, an ex-hitman will stop at nothing to exact revenge on the masked "demons" who have taken over his city.

recommendations.title: Hunted
recommendations.overview: A woman flees two serial killers who are hot on her heels in a forest.

recommendations.title: The Prophecy II
recommendations.overview: The archangel Gabriel returns to try to destroy the human race he despises so much, with the help of a suicidal teen and the opposition of the angel Danyael.

recommendations.title: Ju-On: Black Ghost
recommendations.overview: The supernatural grudge manifests itself by way of a strange cyst growing in the body of a young woman, slowly draining all life from her in revenge for... what?

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: White Heaven in Hell
recommendations.overview: With most of his family already dead at Ogami Itto's hands, Retsudo launches one final plot to destroy him, and when that fails, unleashes the fury of every remaining member of the Yagyu clan.

recommendations.title: A Bluebird in My Heart
recommendations.overview: An ex-con's attempts to live a quiet life are derailed when the daughter of the woman sheltering him is the victim of a vicious attack.

recommendations.title: The Crimes That Bind
recommendations.overview: When her son is accused of raping and trying to murder his ex-wife, Alicia embarks on a journey that will change her life forever.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.
